chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 62 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of MA No.345/2024 (R/Surety) 24.04.2024 Mr. Mir Ali Nawaz Khan, Advocate for applicant / surety. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This application is filed by applicant Muhammad Alim seeking return of surety. As per contentions of learned Counsel for applicant, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Asif, who, on 08.08.2023, was granted protective bail for a period of seven days subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing an original Special Savings Certificate of such amount, has surrendered before the trial Court within stipulated time. His name was placed in column No.2 of the Challan by IO, which has been accepted by the trial Court, as is evident from order dated 13.12.2023, annexed with this application. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General has extended his no objection for granting this application. Accordingly, listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document, as above, to the applicant after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
